injuries.comment: Lundkvist did not play on Thursday's (Dec. 11) game against Minnesota.
The Stars said on Monday (Dec. 8) that Lyubushkin won't accompany the team on its upcoming two-game road trip, according to Sam Nestler of DLLS Stars.

Hintz suffered an apparent foot injury in the third period of Thursday's (Dec. 12) game versus the Wild, and there was no update on his status after the contest, as per Lia Assimakopoulos of The Dallas Morning News.
